title: scutellaria chungtienensis
intro: Scutellaria chungtienensis, also known as the Chinese skullcap, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family and is a type of flowering plant. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria chungtienensis include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as having a potential anti-cancer effect, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Scutellaria chungtienensis is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules for its medicinal uses.
